mapper.sql: id, reporter_user_id, target_type, target_id, reason_type, reason_detail, status, handler_user_id, handle_note, handled_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_report WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 100) + 1 FROM blog_report WHERE id < 10000000000
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_report ( id, reporter_user_id, target_type, target_id, reason_type, reason_detail, status, handler_user_id, handle_note, handled_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{reporterUserId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{reasonType}, #{reasonDetail}, #{status}, #{handlerUserId}, #{handleNote}, #{handledAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE reason_detail = #{reasonDetail}, status = #{status}, handler_user_id = #{handlerUserId}, handle_note = #{handleNote}, handled_at = #{handledAt}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1
